title: trema cannabina var. dielsianum
intro: Trema cannabina var. dielsianum, a plant species in the family Cannabaceae, is also known as the 'Indian Trema' or 'Rangoon Creeper'. The medicinal properties of Trema cannabina var. dielsianum include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, Trema cannabina var. dielsianum is prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
